title: World Bank World Development Indicators — Saudi Arabia Extract
abstract: Extract of World Bank World Development Indicators (WDI) time series for Saudi Arabia, covering economic, trade, and development indicators relevant to coastal and marine-adjacent socio-economic context.

variables.name: series_name
variables.label: Indicator Name
variables.description: Name of the WDI indicator (e.g. GDP, trade balance, employment in agriculture/fisheries).

variables.name: value
variables.label: Indicator Value
variables.description: Annual value of the indicator for Saudi Arabia.

steward.name: World Bank Group (mirrored internally by KAUST)

provenance.license: CC BY 4.0 (World Bank Open Data terms)
provenance.citation: World Bank. World Development Indicators. World Bank Group.

known_issues: Extract not yet filtered to fisheries/marine-relevant indicators specifically — includes broad WDI series.
